title: remote-LAN-service install plan
description: The single artifact all three front-ends (Linux TUI / Windows GUI / unattended) produce and the executor consumes. Secrets do NOT go here — see docs/SECURITY.md.

tier.description: A simple / B multi-line / C dual-server

modules.description: Ordered list of modules to run; each maps to installer/modules/<name>/

params.description: Module-specific values collected by the wizard (server public IP, ports, peer addresses, etc). Free-form per module; each module documents its keys.

notes.description: Free text, e.g. which tier the customer intends to grow into
